# Content Caching Information

**Web Service Endpoint**

Get the status of the content caches on a device.

## Discussion

### Command availability



## Commands and responses

- **ContentCachingInformationCommand**: The command to get the status of the content caches on a device.
- **ContentCachingInformationResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to get the status of the content caches on a device.
